steps: Go to https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard and log in with your Spotify account
Accept the Developer Terms of Service if prompted
Fill in the App name and App description
Add at least one Redirect URI (e.g., http://localhost:3000/callback for local development)
Check the box for 'Web API' under 'Which API/SDKs are you planning to use?'
Accept the Terms of Service and click 'Save'
On your app's dashboard page, click 'Settings'
Copy your Client ID from the Settings page
Click 'View client secret' to reveal and copy your Client Secret

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your Spotify app's Client ID, visible on the app settings page.

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Spotify app's Client Secret. Keep this confidential.

notes: Free to use — no payment required for API access
New apps are in Development mode by default, limited to 25 users (must be added in the dashboard)
For broader access, you must apply for Extended Quota Mode via the dashboard
Redirect URIs must be registered in your app settings before use in OAuth flows
Certain scopes (e.g., user-read-private, playlist-modify-public) require user authorization via OAuth
Client Credentials flow (no user context) works for catalog/search endpoints; user endpoints require Authorization Code flow

test_endpoint.description: Get available Spotify markets — works with Client Credentials token, no user auth needed
